title: USDH on Hyperliquid with Sky
summary_title: Sky's decentralized stablecoin governance and Hyperliquid collateral opportunities
summary_description: Rune from Sky discusses tokenized agents, risk frameworks, and why decentralized money matters for crypto's future.

key_moments.label: Host introduction: Zerk from RecGang, validator on Hyperliquid
Rune's origin story: Bitcoin crash in 2011 led to stablecoins and Maker
Sky's differentiator: decentralized governance and autonomous infrastructure
Decentralized vs custodial stablecoins: crypto ethos and user protection
USDH proposal: wrapping USDS with Hyperliquid star agent and governance
Risk framework: using any uncorrelated asset as collateral with proper enhancement
Sky's case for USDH: 4.85% returns, liquidity, and efficiency without new infrastructure
Call to action: support USDH proposal and explore Spark on Hyperliquid

pull_quote: Decentralization is the whole purpose of why crypto was created as a reaction to the financial crisis.
